title: Skill Events Schema
description: Declares event types for an interactive Ship skill. Events are namespaced to the skill's stable-id.

ship.description: Ship built-in event types this skill uses. e.g. ["annotation", "feedback"]. See https://getship.dev/schemas/ship-events.json for the full list.

custom.description: Custom event types in this skill's namespace. Each id becomes {stable-id}.{id} at runtime.

id.description: Event identifier. Becomes {stable-id}.{id} at runtime. Lowercase, underscores, no hyphens.

direction.description: in = skill receives (human/external → agent). out = skill emits (agent → human/external). both = bidirectional.

label.description: Human-readable name shown in Studio and docs.

description.description: What this event means and when it fires.

schema.description: JSON Schema for the event payload. Validated at ingress by the runtime.
